meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Pricing to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to build a SaaS pricing tool to overcome a lack of portfolio. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code for fast delivery.
content.answer_block: Building a dynamic SaaS pricing calculator solves the 'no portfolio' trap by demonstrating immediate commercial value. By leveraging AI-assisted development, you create a functional, high-converting asset that proves your engineering capability, attracts premium clients, and serves as a repeatable template for future SaaS consulting projects.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, the silence of a missing portfolio echoing louder than your ambition. Clients aren't looking for a resume; they are hunting for proof that you can ship revenue-generating features. The market is saturated with 'to-do' list tutorials, but it is starving for developers who understand the economics of software.

Today, we bridge that gap. By building a sophisticated SaaS pricing model, you aren't just writing code—you are architecting a business solution. We will use Antigravity and Claude Code to move from zero to shipped in hours, transforming your lack of portfolio into a competitive advantage that showcases your mastery of complex, client-facing logic.

steps.title: Define the Business Logic Architecture
steps.description: Before writing code, define the tiers, feature-gating logic, and MRR projections. This ensures your tool isn't just a UI element, but a functional business asset.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust TypeScript interface for a SaaS pricing engine that supports three tiers, dynamic feature toggles, and yearly vs monthly discount calculations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --architect 'Design the pricing schema and logic flow for a 3-tier SaaS pricing calculator'.

steps.title: Scaffold the UI with Antigravity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a clean, responsive interface that mimics industry-standard pricing tables like those found on Stripe or Vercel.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modern, mobile-responsive pricing table component using Tailwind CSS and React that highlights the 'Pro' tier.

steps.title: Implement Dynamic State Management
steps.description: Ensure the UI updates instantly when the user toggles between monthly and annual billing cycles, providing a seamless user experience.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a React hook to handle pricing state changes between monthly and annual billing, including automatic discount calculations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit hooks/usePricing.ts --logic 'Implement toggle logic for annual/monthly billing with a 20% discount applied to annual'.

steps.title: Integrate Conversion Triggers
steps.description: Add call-to-action buttons that simulate a checkout flow to show potential clients you understand the full conversion funnel.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add high-conversion CTA buttons to each pricing tier that logs the user selection to the console for analytics tracking.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit components/PricingTable.tsx --feature 'Add onClick handlers for CTA buttons with logging'.

steps.title: Deploy and Portfolio Showcase
steps.description: Finalize the build and deploy to a static host. This link becomes the centerpiece of your new, high-authority portfolio.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a README.md file that explains the technical decisions and business value of this pricing calculator for a potential client.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --deploy 'Build and deploy the project to Vercel and generate a professional project description'.

pro_tips: Always include a 'Contact Sales' link on the Enterprise tier to simulate real-world B2B sales workflows.
Use CSS variables for pricing colors to allow for instant white-labeling, which is a massive selling point for clients.
Add a small 'Recommended' badge to the middle tier using absolute positioning to demonstrate your CSS layout mastery.
Include a hidden 'debug mode' in your console that outputs the MRR projection based on current selections.
Document your git commit history to show potential clients your professional workflow and iterative development process.
content.next_steps: Once deployed, add this project to your GitHub profile, pin it, and include a direct link in your cold outreach emails to potential clients.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the 'perfect' project to fall into your lap. Create your own proof of work, master the tools of the trade, and start landing high-ticket clients today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.

Use Antigravity to generate a clean, responsive interface that mimics industry-standard pricing tables like those found on Stripe or Vercel.
